items.d: a spot with very little rain and no wet ground.
items.s: Always keep your matches in ___ so they stay dry and still light when you need them.
items.hintDe: Ein Ort mit sehr wenig Regen, an dem alles trocken bleibt.

items.d: a big bag you carry on your back, with your food and a drink inside for a long walk.
items.s: We all had a ___ on our back, with food and a drink inside for the one-day walk.
items.hintDe: Eine Tasche, die du auf dem Rücken trägst.

items.d: a deep valley where high steep walls of rock go up on both sides.
items.s: We climbed down into the huge ___ where the walls of rock go up so high.
items.hintDe: Ein tiefes Tal mit hohen, steilen Felswänden auf beiden Seiten.

items.d: the most important city of a country or state, where the country is run from.
items.s: Which city is the state ___ of California - Los Angeles, Sacramento or San Francisco?
items.hintDe: Die wichtigste Stadt eines Landes, von der aus das Land regiert wird.

items.d: a link that joins two things, like the way your computer joins the internet.
items.s: His internet ___ in the old hotel was so slow that the videos would not play.
items.hintDe: Eine Verbindung zwischen zwei Dingen, zum Beispiel zum Internet.

items.d: the man or woman who has done a crime.
items.s: Alcatraz was a famous prison and home to some of the most dangerous ___ in the US.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der ein Verbrechen begangen hat.

items.d: the man or woman who is out on a bike.
items.s: There is a special lane along the road just for every ___ to ride a bike.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der mit dem Fahrrad unterwegs ist.

items.d: a way for cars of hard ground with no stones on it, often way out in the country.
items.s: Out of the city, we drove along a bumpy brown ___ all the way to the old farm.
items.hintDe: Eine Straße aus festgefahrener Erde, ohne Asphalt.

items.d: really great and wonderful, much more than just good.
items.s: Don't forget our ___ national parks - they are some of the best in the whole world!
items.hintDe: Etwas ist nicht nur gut, sondern ganz wunderbar.

items.d: well known to you, so you know it well when you look at it.
items.s: The Golden Gate Bridge is one of the most ___ sights of San Francisco.
items.hintDe: Dir gut bekannt, sodass du es sofort wiedererkennst.

items.d: a boat that carries people and cars over the sea or a river.
items.s: You can take a ___ over the water to Alcatraz Island and back.
items.hintDe: Ein Boot, das Menschen und Autos über das Wasser bringt.

items.d: a system that gives a car a lot of power, so it holds the road well on rough ground.
items.s: We need a jeep with ___ to drive over the rough roads in the desert.
items.hintDe: Ein System im Auto, das alle vier Räder antreibt.

items.d: the man or woman who looks in the earth and in rivers to find a shiny yellow metal.
items.s: Very many ___ came to California hoping to become rich from gold.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der in der Erde und in Flüssen nach Gold sucht.

items.d: a time when very many people hurry to one place to look for a shiny yellow metal.
items.s: The California ___ in 1849 was a time when very many people came to the American West for gold.
items.hintDe: Eine Zeit, in der ganz viele Menschen zum Goldsuchen an einen Ort eilen.

items.d: led by somebody who shows you the way and talks about it.
items.s: These days you can go on a ___ tour of Alcatraz Island with a real guide.
items.hintDe: Von einer Person geführt, die dir den Weg zeigt und alles erklärt.

items.d: the main building or office of a big firm or group, where the bosses work.
items.s: Two park rangers from the park's ___ came and helped us safely back down.
items.hintDe: Das Hauptgebäude einer Firma oder Gruppe, von dem aus alles geleitet wird.

items.d: how tall or how high a thing is, from the ground up to the very top.
items.s: These giant redwood trees can reach a ___ of more than 100 metres.
items.hintDe: Wie hoch etwas ist, vom Boden bis ganz nach oben.

items.d: free and not ruled by another country.
items.s: For just one month in 1846, California was an ___ country and ruled over itself.
items.hintDe: Frei und von keinem anderen Land regiert.

items.d: a place at a station where you can ask for help, times and the way.
items.s: Ask at the ___ if you need a free map of the city or the times of the trains.
items.hintDe: Ein Ort am Bahnhof, an dem du nach Hilfe, Zeiten und dem Weg fragen kannst.

items.d: a clever new way of doing things, or a new machine nobody had before.
items.s: The first mobile phone was a great ___ that completely changed how people live.
items.hintDe: Eine clevere neue Idee oder etwas Neues, das es vorher nicht gab.

items.d: one of the two soft red parts of your mouth.
items.s: Her ___ were dry and red, and she was shaking and about to cry.
items.hintDe: Einer der beiden weichen Teile oben und unten an deinem Mund.

items.d: a long row of high rocky hills, all joined up.
items.s: The Alps are the longest ___ in Europe and run across many countries.
items.hintDe: Viele hohe Berge nebeneinander in einer langen Reihe.

items.d: the man or woman whose job is to write the instructions that make computers work.
items.s: Olivia's mum has a ___ job at a big firm in Silicon Valley.
items.hintDe: Jemand, der die Anweisungen schreibt, mit denen Computer arbeiten.

items.d: the trains and the long metal tracks they run on.
items.s: The ___ service to Manchester is leaving from platform 3 in ten minutes.
items.hintDe: Die Züge und die langen Gleise, auf denen sie fahren.

items.d: the long high rocky top that runs along a mountain or hill, where you can walk along it.
items.s: From the high ___ at the top, we could look down into the valleys way down below on both sides.
items.hintDe: Der lange, schmale obere Teil eines Berges, an dem man entlanggehen kann.

items.d: a cooler dark area out of the bright sun.
items.s: I sat down in the cool ___ of a big rock to keep out of the burning sun.
items.hintDe: Ein kühlerer, dunkler Bereich außerhalb der hellen Sonne.

items.d: a part of a country that has its own government, like California in the US.
items.s: California is a big ___ in the west of the US, with cities like Los Angeles.
items.hintDe: Ein Teil eines Landes, der eine eigene Regierung hat.

items.d: going up or down very fast, nearly straight, so it is not easy to climb.
items.s: A canyon is deep, with ___ walls of rock that go up high on both sides.
items.hintDe: Es geht sehr schnell nach oben oder unten, fast senkrecht.

items.d: the feeling when you really want to drink.
items.s: After a long time in the hot sun, their ___ was so bad that they died for want of water.
items.hintDe: Das Gefühl, wenn du unbedingt etwas trinken willst.

items.d: to be in a certain place or in a certain part of a country.
items.s: Death Valley is ___ between two long mountain ranges in California.
items.hintDe: An einem bestimmten Ort oder in einer bestimmten Gegend sein.

items.d: to be at the platform in time to get on it before it leaves.
items.s: We had to run to the platform to ___ the train before it left without us.
items.hintDe: Du bist rechtzeitig am Bahnsteig, um in deinen Zug einzusteigen.

items.d: to travel to work and home again every day.
items.s: My mum ___ to the Valley every day, but she did not like the long drive at all.
items.hintDe: Du fährst jeden Tag zur Arbeit und wieder nach Hause.

items.d: to break open or break into pieces, often with a sharp noise.
items.s: My mouth was so dry that my lips were sore and about to ___.
items.hintDe: Etwas bricht oder platzt auf, oft mit einem scharfen Geräusch.

items.d: when your mobile phone does not work because it cannot connect here.
items.s: High up in the mountains we ___, so we could not call anyone for help.
items.hintDe: Dein Handy funktioniert hier nicht, weil es keine Verbindung bekommt.

items.d: to suddenly find somebody hiding, or a small thing that was hard to find.
items.s: It was so crowded that I couldn't ___ you in the big crowd at the match.
items.hintDe: Du bemerkst plötzlich etwas, das schwer zu finden ist.

items.d: to come into control of a place or thing that was not yours before.
items.s: On Sundays the road has no cars, and the cyclists ___ the whole street.
items.hintDe: Du übernimmst die Kontrolle über etwas, das vorher jemand anderem gehörte.

items.d: completely, in every way, with nothing missing.
items.s: You are ___ right about this, and I agree with you.
items.hintDe: Völlig, in jeder Hinsicht, ohne Ausnahme.
